notes: PM-OPS-002 audits Sprint 18 (67 tasks) and renders a factual closure verdict of CLOSED_WITH_RESIDUAL_ACTIONS. Method: deterministic evidence collection + live git verification + an independent verification pass. That verification pass corrected two false-negatives in the first collector run — (1) DOC-016's CI-gate limb .github/workflows/docs-integrity.yml IS present on origin/main (blob 23a19fcf, commit f57490a91/#598), so DOC-016 is fully delivered (C09->C04); (2) the '28 synthetic x16 timestamp' figure was derived from the gitignored generated _summary.json cache and is not committed-reproducible, replaced with the committed defect (34 completed_at:null + 5 tasks with no task-tracking.json). Verdict unchanged. This audit is read-only over the product; the 3 stale-Backlog CSV flips are deferred to R-STATUS-2. The 4 standard validations pass trivially (docs+report+attestation diff touches no compiled source) and are enforced green by the non-bypassable scripts/pre-ship.mjs pre-push gate with Docker up.
